name: Io
description: Beep Boop Link Io, the Wisp Io is everywhere, and in all things. Denounced by enemies as the great unmaker, worshiped by scholars as the twinkling of a divine eye, this strange Wisp of life-force occupies all planes at once, the merest fraction of its being crossing into physical existence at any one moment. Like the great twin riders Dark and Light, and yet another ancient traveler whose true history is lost to the ages, Io the Wisp is a Fundamental of the universe, a force older than time, a wanderer from realms far beyond mortal understanding. Io is nothing less than the sum of all attractive and repulsive forces within the material field, a sentient manifestation of the charge that bind existence together. It is only in the controlled warping of these electrical waylines that Io's presence can be experienced on the physical plane. A benevolent, cooperative force, Io bonds its strange magnetism to others so that the power of allies might be enhanced. Its motives inscrutable, its strength unimaginable, Io moves through the physical plane, the perfect expression of the mysteries of the universe.

abilities.name: Equilibrium
abilities.description: Grants a greater outgoing damage amplification the closer Io is to full health. Additionally grants a greater health restore amplification and heal amplification the closer Io is to zero health. Max Health to Max Damage Amp Threshold: 100%. Max Damage Amp: 4%. Max Health to Max Heal Amp Threshold: 1%. Max Heal Amp: 4%. Max Health Restore Amp: 4%. Max Damage Amp Increase: 0.4%.

abilities.name: Tether
abilities.description: Grants bonus movement speed to both Io and the tethered-ally while active. Whenever Io restores health or mana, the tethered-ally gains a bonus portion of the restoration. The link between Io and the affected allied unit applies a brief slow to enemy units coming in contact. Cast Range: 1600. Break Distance: 1000. Pull Distance: 700. Break Distance During Pull: 2150 Tether Duration:. Break Distance During Pull: 2150. Ally Heal Factor: 0.6/0.8/1/1.2. Mana Cost: 12.

abilities.name: Spirits
abilities.description: The particles' damage is less effective on creeps, but they do not explode upon collision. Spirits now passively spawn, orbits and replenishes itself around Io constantly. Applies movement speed slow to enemy heroes coming in contact with. Reduces cooldown, and now causes Spirits to immediately explode upon cast. Number of Spirits: 5. Hero Search Radius: 110. Explosion Radius: 360. Explosion Damage: 30/50/70/90 (1500/2500/3500/4500). Duration: 15. Move Speed Slow: (25%). Cooldown: 90/100/110/120.

abilities.name: Overcharge
abilities.description: Grants self max health as bonus health regeneration, attack speed bonus, and outgoing spell damage amplification. Grants the tethered allied unit all Overcharges' ability effects as well. Max Health as Health Regen Bonus: 0.5%/0.6%/0.7%/0.8% (0.7%/0.8%/0.9%/1%). Attack Speed Bonus: 35/60/85/110. Spell Damage Amp: 8%/10%/12%/14%. Duration: 8 (9.5). Cooldown: 25/22/19/16. Mana Cost: 40/60/80/100.

abilities.name: Relocate
abilities.description: Teleports Io to any location globally. Upon the duration expires, Io will return to the original ability cast location. Teleports the tethered allied unit alongside with Io. Upon the duration expiring, Io and the tethered allied unit will return to the original ability cast location. Cast Range: Global. Duration: 12. Cooldown: 90/80/70. Mana Cost: 175.
